overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a scenic coastal cliffside path during a vibrant sunset. The character traverses varied terrain including grassy cliffs, a stone bridge passage, and wooden stairs while the sky transitions through purple and pink dusk hues.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside trail with ocean overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy cliff edge overlooking the ocean, passing wildlife on the slopes

notable_agents.action: goats grazing on the grassy hillside beside the path

entered.detail: calm sea stretching to the horizon with soft sunset reflection
tall mountain peak visible across the water against the pink sky
rocky cliff formations along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide coastal cliffside trail at sunset. Geralt walks forward along a dirt path with the ocean visible to the right and a distant mountain silhouetted against the pink sky. Goats graze on the grassy slopes to the left as the camera follows the character's steady pace along the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone passage between rock walls

events.description: entering enclosed rocky corridor with stone bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone passage between tall rock walls

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge with low stone railings spanning the gap
tall vertical rock faces forming a narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed passage between steep rock walls. The ground changes to cobblestone as Geralt crosses a stone bridge structure. The ocean view is temporarily blocked by the rocky terrain, while the distant mountain shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairway bridge ascending the cliff

events.description: beginning ascent up wooden stairs built into the cliffside

agents.ego_description: climbing the weathered wooden stairs and platforms built into the cliff face

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank staircase ascending the cliff
wooden support beams and platforms attached to the rock face

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins ascending a wooden stairway structure built into the cliffside. The camera follows the upward motion as the character climbs the weathered wooden planks, with support scaffolding visible to the right. The enclosed feeling continues as the path gains elevation.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal trail at dusk with large boulders

events.description: sky darkens to deeper purple as dusk settles over the landscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated coastal path as twilight deepens and the sky turns vivid purple

entered.detail: massive rock boulders scattered beside the trail
ocean visible again from the higher elevation with distant islands

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the wooden structure, the scene opens onto a higher elevation coastal trail. Large boulders line the right side of the path while the ocean becomes visible again in the distance. The sky has deepened to rich purple and pink hues as dusk settles, with pine trees visible on the left hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal cliffside that transitions from an open sunset trail into a confined rocky passage before ascending to a high-altitude overlook. It begins with Geralt walking a dirt path beside grazing goats, with the ocean and a silhouetted mountain visible under a pink sky. As the terrain narrows, the scene shifts into an enclosed passage of steep rock walls where the dirt gives way to a cobblestone bridge, temporarily obscuring the sea. The camera then follows an upward trajectory as Geralt climbs a weathered wooden stairway built into the cliffside, maintaining a sense of enclosure while gaining elevation. Finally, the path opens once more onto a higher trail lined with large boulders and pine trees, revealing the distant ocean beneath a sky that has deepened into rich purple and pink dusk hues.
